feats.name: Hex: Evil Eye
feats.shortDesc: Target within 30 ft. takes -2 on one chosen stat category for 8 rounds (Will DC 17 = 1 round).
feats.fullDesc: The witch can cause doubt in the mind of a foe within 30 feet that she can see. The target takes a -2 penalty on one of the following (witch's choice): AC, ability checks, attack rolls, saving throws, or skill checks. This hex lasts for 8 rounds. A Will save (DC 17) reduces this to just 1 round. This is a mind-affecting effect.

feats.name: Hex: Misfortune
feats.shortDesc: Target rolls twice and takes the worse result for 1 round (Will DC 17 negates).
feats.fullDesc: For 1 round, anytime the creature makes an ability check, attack roll, saving throw, or skill check, it must roll twice and take the worse result. A Will save (DC 17) negates this hex. This is a standard action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity.

feats.name: Hex: Slumber
feats.shortDesc: Target of any HD falls into magical sleep for 4 rounds (Will DC 17 negates).
feats.fullDesc: If the creature fails a Will save (DC 17), it falls into a deep, magical sleep for 4 rounds. This hex can affect a creature of any Hit Dice. This is a standard action. The slumbering creature can be woken by damage or a successful Heal check, but not by loud noise alone.

feats.name: Hex: Fortune
feats.shortDesc: Grant a creature within 30 ft. one reroll on any d20 check for 1 round.
feats.fullDesc: The witch can grant a creature within 30 feet a bit of good luck for 1 round. The target can call upon this good luck once per round, allowing it to reroll any ability check, attack roll, saving throw, or skill check, taking the better result. This is a standard action.

feats.name: Hex: Cackle
feats.shortDesc: Move action: extend the duration of an active hex by 1 round (range 30 ft.).
feats.fullDesc: The witch can cackle madly as a move action. Any creature within 30 feet that is under the effects of an agony hex, charm hex, evil eye hex, fortune hex, or misfortune hex caused by the witch has the duration of that hex extended by 1 round. This hex can be used only once per round.

feats.name: Persuasive
feats.shortDesc: +2 bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks.
feats.fullDesc: You are skilled at swaying attitudes and intimidating others into your way of thinking. You get a +2 bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate skill checks. If you have 10 or more ranks in one of these skills, the bonus increases to +4 for that skill.

feats.name: Fiendish Resistance
feats.fullDesc: As a Tiefling, Mazikeen has cold resistance 5, electricity resistance 5, and fire resistance 5. She ignores 5 points of damage from each of these energy types each time she takes that type of damage.

feats.name: Alertness (via Familiar)
feats.shortDesc: +2 on Perception and Sense Motive while Salem is within arm's reach.
feats.fullDesc: While Maze's familiar Salem is within arm's reach, she gains the Alertness feat: +2 bonus on Perception and Sense Motive skill checks. If she has 10 or more ranks in one of these skills, the bonus increases to +4 for that skill.

classAbilities.name: Witch's Familiar — Salem (a.k.a. Blackjack)
classAbilities.description: Salem is Maze's black cat familiar (magical beast). He stores all of Maze's spells and grants Alertness while within arm's reach. At 4th level Salem can deliver Maze's touch spells. Empathic link up to 1 mile. Salem has Cold/Electricity/Fire resistance 1 (Bonus Familiar Resistance).

classAbilities.name: Healing Patron
classAbilities.description: Maze's patron is a mysterious force tied to Healing. At even levels the patron adds new spells to her familiar's list automatically. Current patron spells accessible: Lesser Restoration (level 2).

classAbilities.name: Hex Save DC
classAbilities.description: All of Maze's hex save DCs are 17 (10 + 2 half-level + 5 INT modifier). Concentration check bonus: +9.

classAbilities.name: Darkness (Spell-Like Ability)
classAbilities.description: Maze can cast Darkness 1/day as a spell-like ability (Tiefling racial). Duration 4 minutes, range Touch, radiates darkness in a 20-ft. radius.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: You detect magical auras within a 60-foot cone. The strength and school of each aura is revealed on subsequent rounds of concentration.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: This spell imbues the subject with a touch of divine guidance, granting a +1 competence bonus on one attack roll, saving throw, or skill check of the target's choice.

spells.name: Resistance
spells.description: You imbue the subject with magical energy that protects it from harm, granting it a +1 resistance bonus on saves.

spells.name: Stabilize
spells.description: You target a living creature at -1 or fewer HP. The creature is automatically stabilized and does not lose further hit points from bleeding.

spells.name: Touch of Fatigue
spells.description: You channel negative energy through your touch, fatiguing the target. A fatigued character can neither run nor charge and takes a -2 penalty to Strength and Dexterity.

spells.name: Bleed
spells.description: You cause a living creature that is below 0 hit points but stabilized to resume dying.

spells.name: Daze
spells.description: This spell clouds the mind of a humanoid creature with 4 or fewer Hit Dice so that it takes no actions. Humanoids of 5 or more HD are not affected.

spells.name: Cure Light Wounds
spells.description: When laying your hand upon a living creature, you channel positive energy that cures 1d8+4 points of damage.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.description: An invisible but tangible field of force surrounds the subject, providing a +4 armor bonus to AC. No armor check penalty or arcane spell failure. Replaces lighter armor bonuses (net +3 over Haramaki).

spells.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
spells.description: A ray springs from your hand. On a successful ranged touch attack, the subject takes a Strength penalty equal to 1d6+2 (minimum 1). Fortitude save halves the penalty.

spells.name: Remove Fear
spells.description: You instill courage in the subject, granting it a +4 morale bonus against fear effects for 10 minutes. If already under a fear effect, the subject gets a new saving throw with the +4 bonus.

spells.name: Snowball
spells.description: You conjure a ball of packed ice and snow as a ranged touch attack. Deals 4d6 cold damage on a hit. The target must make a Fortitude save or be staggered for 1 round.

spells.name: Aggressive Thundercloud
spells.description: A 5-ft.-diameter flying storm cloud deals 3d6 electricity damage to any creature it moves over (Reflex DC 17 negates). You can direct the cloud as a move action.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.description: You call upon the powers of unlife to render the subject blinded or deafened, as you choose (Fortitude DC 17 negates). The effect is permanent until magically cured.

spells.name: Cure Moderate Wounds
spells.description: When laying your hand upon a living creature, you channel positive energy that cures 2d8+4 points of damage.

spells.name: Glitterdust
spells.description: A cloud of golden particles covers everyone in a 10-ft.-radius spread (Will DC 17 or be blinded for 4 rounds). Invisible creatures and objects are outlined, negating invisibility for the duration.

spells.name: Restoration, Lesser
spells.description: Lesser restoration dispels any magical effects reducing one of the subject's ability scores or cures 1d4 points of temporary ability damage to one of the subject's ability scores. It also eliminates any fatigue suffered by the subject.
